JUDGE WICK, BRENDA FIELDS, REPORTER. 10:23 AM C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. ALL PRESENT. RICHARD DUDUM FOR PLTF. DEFT IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED, TERMS PUT ON THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF. & AGAINST DEFT FOR POSS. & RESTIT. OF THE PREMISES, PLTF. WAIVES BACK RENTS/DAMAGES. WRIT MAY ISSUE, BUT EVICTIONS STAYED UNTIL 7/19/94, EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS, RENTAL AGREEMENT FORFEITED. PLTF. PREPARED JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRICHTON, GINGER EWING AKA GINGER CRECIE AKA GINGER CRESCI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 126 BALBOA STREET, SF, CA 94118, STAYED UNTIL JUL-19-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
